tools.Name: Claude Code
tools.Description: An autonomous AI agent for the terminal that can read, write, and execute code to build or debug applications.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex coding tasks, architectural planning, and project-wide refactoring.

tools.Name: DeepSeek-V3
tools.Description: A large-scale Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model optimized for efficient inference and high-performance reasoning.
tools.Use_Case: Powering large-scale natural language processing, coding assistance, and reasoning-intensive applications.

tools.Name: Memori
tools.Description: Agent-native, LLM-agnostic memory infrastructure that persists interaction states as structured memory.
tools.Use_Case: Providing durable long-term memory and context for AI agents across different sessions and frameworks.
